calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Continued To Oct-31-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff US Foodservice, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Culinary Investors LLC, a limited liability company, dba Slates Restaurant and dba Belana Restaurant.
Default was entered against defendant on July 15, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 14, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 8, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of US Foodservice, Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Culinary Investors LLC, a limited liability company, dba Slates Restaurant and dba Belana Restaurant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,473.32.
Prejudgment Interest - $783.00.
Attorney's Fees - $8,000.00.
Costs - $335.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $41,591.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Off Calendar
